strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (15+ years) heavily utilizing the required primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) across multiple senior and staff-level roles.
Strong background in testing and software craftsmanship, including TDD, creating testing libraries, and instructing on test automation.
Direct, recent experience with AI agent development and Model Context Protocol (MCP) infrastructure, directly aligning with niche role requirements.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, which are primary stack requirements, though highly experienced in the broader Node.js and testing ecosystems.
Recent track record includes several shorter tenures (1-2 years) and a current career gap, which may prompt questions regarding long-term retention.
Experience with the requested secondary technologies (Java/Kotlin) appears somewhat dated, primarily stemming from roles held between 2016 and 2018.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with over 15 years of development experience, strongly matching the core requirements for TypeScript, Node.js, and React. His recent work with AI agents and MCP directly fulfills a niche requirement of the role, and his deep commitment to testing and software architecture makes him a strong fit for a senior full-stack position. While there is no explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, his extensive background in Node.js, TDD, and building test runners suggests he can easily adapt to these specific tools.
